title: Clamp abnormal Tick dt
description: Protect BattleRoom or game mode update logic from abnormal dt values so large Tick intervals do not cause resource, cooldown, or unit state jumps.
success_criteria: Tick or Update logic clamps or rejects abnormal dt values.
Normal 60 FPS update behavior remains unchanged.
No matchmaking, persistence, or client files are modified.
risk_points: Clamping too low can slow gameplay.
Ignoring negative dt must not stall cooldown/resource updates forever.
